10.reason: [Incorrect condition logic: comparing characters with integer 0/9 instead of '0'/'9'; also checking only one side of the range (e.g., a[j-1] >= 'a' but not <= 'z', and similarly for others), and mixing types across cases]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect condition logic: comparing characters with integer 0/9 instead of '0'/'9'; also checking only one side of the range (e.g., a[j-1] >= 'a' but not <= 'z', and similarly for others), and mixing types across cases]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect condition logic: comparing characters with integer 0/9 instead of '0'/'9'; also checking only one side of the range (e.g., a[j-1] >= 'a' but not <= 'z', and similarly for others), and mixing types without ensuring both ends are same type and valid]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect condition logic: comparing characters with numeric literals 0 and 9 without quotes; also, conditions check only one side of the range (e.g., a[j-1] >= 'a' but a[j+1] <= 'z'), which doesn't ensure both are in the same category or that a[j+1] > a[j-1]. Additionally, accessing a[j-1] when j=0 leads to out-of-bounds read.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect condition logic: comparing characters with numeric literals 0 and 9 instead of '0' and '9'; also, conditions check only one side of the range (e.g., a[j-1] >= 'a' but a[j+1] <= 'z') without ensuring both ends are in the same category and valid for expansion]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect range checks: comparing characters with integer 0/9 instead of '0'/'9'; also logic is flawed as it doesn't ensure both ends are same type and valid]

13.reason: [Loop runs even when expansion shouldn't occur (e.g., if a[j+1] <= a[j-1]), leading to negative or zero iterations or incorrect output; also, no check that both sides are same type and valid]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop runs even when expansion shouldn't occur (e.g., if a[j+1] <= a[j-1]), leading to negative or zero iterations or incorrect output; also, no check that both sides are same type and valid]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop runs even when expansion shouldn't occur (e.g., if a[j+1] <= a[j-1]), leading to incorrect or negative iterations; also, no check that a[j+1] > a[j-1]]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Potential undefined behavior: if a[j-1] >= a[j+1], the loop runs with negative or zero iterations incorrectly; also, no validation that expansion is valid (same type and increasing). Moreover, if j=0, a[j-1] is invalid memory access.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop runs even when expansion is invalid (e.g., when a[j+1] <= a[j-1]), leading to negative or zero iterations; also, no check that both surrounding chars are of same type and a[j+1] > a[j-1]]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop runs even when expansion shouldn't happen (e.g., if a[j+1] <= a[j-1]), leading to negative or zero iterations or wrong output]
